pokemon:cyclizar.name: Cyclizar
pokemon:cyclizar.summary: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.
It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider’s body heat warms Cyclizar’s back and lifts the Pokémon’s spirit.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

form:cyclizar.name: Cyclizar
form:cyclizar.summary: Cyclizar form with Dragon / Normal typing.
